[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000000 a
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 000000000 a
4 011000100 3
5 100101110 5
6 100111000 4
7 001010101 4

01 000010101 3
12 111101001 6
23 010010010 3
34 011100000 3
45 000100111 4
56 000011010 3
67 010000000 1
70 100110011 5

02 000000011 2
13 010000100 2
24 110001101 5
35 100111000 4 match 6
46 111000010 4
57 101100101 5
60 001001100 3
71 011011001 5
